productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Formal Light Brown Shoe
description: Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to take off and wear their shoes with ease. Team this with jeans or cargoes and t-shirts for that smart look.Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Slip-on system for easy wear and removal Elastic inserts on the sides of the tongue for a snug, customised Fit Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Rounded collar with a fabric inner for comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole in a boat shape for ergonomic comfort Textured lugs along the medial side and toe region, with terraced lugs on the lateral side and pivot points on the forefoot and heel for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the foot Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
